GET.name: GET
GET.description: Retrieve data from the server without modifying it

POST.name: POST
POST.description: Submit data to the server to create a new resource

PUT.name: PUT
PUT.description: Replace an entire resource on the server

PATCH.name: PATCH
PATCH.description: Partially modify an existing resource on the server

DELETE.name: DELETE
DELETE.description: Remove a resource from the server

METHOD.label: [METHOD]
METHOD.description: The HTTP method used in the request (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, etc.)

URL.label: [URL]
URL.description: The endpoint path or full URL where the request was sent

STATUS.label: [STATUS]
STATUS.description: HTTP status code returned by the server (200=OK, 400=Bad Request, 500=Error, etc.)

RESPONSE.label: [RESPONSE]
RESPONSE.description: Time taken by the server to process and respond to the request in milliseconds

IP.label: [IP]
IP.description: The IP address of the client that made the request

SIZE.label: [SIZE]
SIZE.description: The size of the response data in bytes

5xx.description: Server Error - Server failed to process
